probe: List the themes, settings, tones, and word-flavors you feel pulled toward, comma-separated.
answer:
Speakeasies, underground gatherings, whispers of secrets, coded language, shadowy figures, clandestine meetings, clandestine dealings, hushed conversations, forbidden knowledge, hushed tones, covert operations, veiled intentions, backroom negotiations, enigmatic figures, whispered rumors, hushed exchanges, under-the-radar activities.
